# Ductum Full Agent Authoring Contract

Version: ductum.authoring-contract.v1
Generated by scripts/generate-authoring-contract.mjs. Do not edit by hand.

## Primitive Model

Factory owns global settings. Project groups repositories. Repository may have Components.
Spec contains Tasks. Task dispatch creates Attempts. Attempts move through Workflow stages.

## Enumerations

- workflowStages: understand, implement, ship, done
- terminalStates: failed, stalled, cancelled, paused, frozen, quarantined
- specStatuses: draft, reviewed, approved, implementing, done, failed
- taskStatuses: pending, blocked, ready, active, done, failed
- taskComplexities: simple, standard, complex
- agentRoles: builder, reviewer, docs, watcher
- agentCapabilities: build, test, fix, review, docs, quick-fix
- evidenceTypes: ci, review, test, lint, custom, exit_demo.run
- typedEvidenceKinds: worktree.snapshot, harness.failure, operator.cancel, operator.note, exit_demo.run

## WorkflowProfile YAML

Required fields: apiVersion, kind, metadata.name, context.required_files, verify.commands, push.
context.required_files and verify.commands must each contain at least one string.
context.optional_files and setup.commands default to empty arrays when omitted.
push.protected_branches defaults to main when empty or omitted.
Remote branch, PR, and issue publication is reserved for Ductum through configured GitHub App credentials.

```yaml
apiVersion: edictum/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowProfile
metadata:
  name: coding-guard
  description: Guarded implementation flow
context:
  required_files:
    - README.md
  optional_files:
    - AGENTS.md
setup:
  commands:
    - pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
verify:
  commands:
    - pnpm test
review:
  approval_message: Approve only after external review reports no new issues
push:
  protected_branches:
    - main
  allowed_git_commands:
    - git status
    - git diff
    - git add
    - git commit
```

## SpecIntake / WorkPackage JSON

schemaVersion must be ductum.spec-intake.v1. Attempts are never authored; Ductum creates them at runtime.

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": "ductum.spec-intake.v1",
  "project": {
    "name": "factory"
  },
  "repositories": [
    {
      "name": "ductum",
      "localPath": ".",
      "components": [
        {
          "name": "core",
          "path": "packages/core"
        }
      ],
      "tasks": [
        {
          "name": "Add generated authoring contract",
          "prompt": "Implement the bounded contract slice and run verification.",
          "verification": [
            "pnpm -C packages/core test"
          ],
          "assignedAgent": "mimi",
          "complexity": "standard",
          "requiredRole": "builder",
          "status": "pending"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "spec": {
    "name": "Authoring Contract",
    "status": "approved",
    "document": "Generated contract slice."
  }
}
```

## MCP Agent Tool Surface

### ductum.workflow
Get the workflow rules for this run. Call this FIRST to understand allowed tools, stage exit conditions, and current stage.
Required input: none
Input fields: none
Example: {}

### ductum.gate_check
Query the current workflow state for the bound run. Read-only; stage advancement is automatic.
Required input: none
Input fields: none
Example: {}

### ductum.next_task
Get the next unblocked task for an optional project and role.
Required input: none
Input fields: {"project":"optional project name","role":"optional role name"}
Example: {}

### ductum.accept
Claim a task, create a run, and bind this MCP session to it.
Required input: task_id
Input fields: {"task_id":"task id to claim"}
Example: {"task_id":"task_123"}

### ductum.get_context
Get context for a task. If this MCP session is unbound, bind it to the recovered run; otherwise preserve the current bound run.
Required input: task_id
Input fields: {"task_id":"task id to inspect or recover"}
Example: {"task_id":"task_123"}

### ductum.update
Record a progress update for the bound run.
Required input: message
Input fields: {"message":"short progress note"}
Example: {"message":"Implemented parser changes; running tests next."}

### ductum.heartbeat
Refresh the heartbeat for the bound run.
Required input: none
Input fields: none
Example: {}

### ductum.decide
Record a decision on the bound run.
Required input: decision, context
Input fields: {"decision":"chosen path","context":"why this was decided","alternatives":"optional array of rejected alternatives"}
Example: {"decision":"Keep the parser strict","context":"Loose parsing would hide invalid specs."}

### ductum.evidence
Attach evidence to the bound run.
Required input: type, payload
Input fields: {"type":"evidence type","payload":"JSON object payload"}
Example: {"type":"test","payload":{"command":"pnpm test","passed":true}}

### ductum.link
Link branch, commit, or PR metadata to the bound run.
Required input: none
Input fields: {"branch":"optional branch","commit":"optional commit sha","pr":"optional PR URL or number"}
Example: {"branch":"feat/example","commit":"abc1234"}

### ductum.complete
Mark the bound implementation session complete. The factory may still verify, review, and ship it.
Required input: result
Input fields: {"result":"completion summary, at least 50 characters","pr":"optional PR URL or number"}
Example: {"result":"Implemented the parser fix, added regression coverage, and ran the requested test suite."}

### ductum.fail
Report a recoverable or terminal failure on the bound run.
Required input: reason
Input fields: {"reason":"failure reason","recoverable":"optional boolean, defaults to recoverable handling"}
Example: {"reason":"Cannot continue because required credentials are missing.","recoverable":false}

## Extension Manifest Draft

Operator-allowlisted ExtensionRegistry manifest loading is shipped for capability registration. Runtime execution of arbitrary extension code is not shipped yet; entrypoint is recorded and resolved, not imported.

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": "ductum.extension.v1",
  "id": "com.example.local-notifier",
  "kind": "notifier",
  "entrypoint": "./dist/index.js",
  "capabilities": [
    "notify.run_state"
  ],
  "permissions": {
    "network": false,
    "secrets": []
  }
}
```
